metadata.name: Finance Sector - AML/Transaction Monitoring
metadata.description: Knowledge Graph for Anti-Money Laundering and transaction monitoring in financial institutions
metadata.regulatory_framework: Bank Secrecy Act, AML Regulations, FinCEN Guidance

rules.subject: Transaction amount
rules.reasoning: FinCEN requires SAR filing for transactions of $10,000+ without clear business purpose

rules.subject: Customer identification
rules.reasoning: CIP rule requires identification verification before account activation

rules.subject: SAR filing
rules.reasoning: Suspicious activities must be reported within 30 days of detection

rules.subject: Wire transfer over $3,000
rules.reasoning: Wire transfers must include complete customer information per Regulation EFT

rules.subject: PEP (Politically Exposed Person)
rules.reasoning: Enhanced due diligence required for politically exposed persons
